title: Rehearsal Stop-Condition and Abort Matrix
description: Deterministic decision mapping for stopping, aborting, escalating, or failing closed during future rehearsal proposals. This matrix is evaluated before any rehearsal proposal is created and during rehearsal execution.
safety_notice: This matrix is a static governance artifact. It does not approve any runtime execution, rehearsal execution, or live trading. All conditions must be evaluated by an operator or automated check before proceeding.

conditions.name: dry_run_false_detected
conditions.description: A Freqtrade config or adapter has dry_run=false set

conditions.name: live_state_active
conditions.description: LIVE_APPROVED or LIVE_ACTIVE state is detected in the system

conditions.name: exchange_credentials_accessible
conditions.description: Exchange API keys, secrets, tokens, or wallet data are accessible in configs, env, or source

conditions.name: real_adapters_enabled
conditions.description: SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS=1 is set in the environment

conditions.name: riskguard_unavailable
conditions.description: RiskGuard is not available during a safety-relevant decision

conditions.name: shadowlogger_unavailable
conditions.description: ShadowLogger is not available during a decision or write action

conditions.name: prerequisite_missing
conditions.description: A required prerequisite artifact from #127–#132 is missing or invalid

conditions.name: evidence_missing
conditions.description: Required evidence for a stop-condition check is missing or cannot be collected without runtime action

conditions.name: evidence_stale
conditions.description: Existing evidence is older than its validity window and has not been refreshed

conditions.name: evidence_ambiguous
conditions.description: Evidence exists but its meaning or integrity cannot be determined (e.g. missing checksums, untrusted source)

conditions.name: scope_boundary_violation
conditions.description: Proposal scope includes components, services, or actions outside the approved rehearsal boundary

conditions.name: runtime_action_in_scope
conditions.description: Proposal scope includes any runtime action (Docker, Freqtrade, exchange, deployment, service call)

conditions.name: approval_token_missing
conditions.description: Required approval token is missing, expired, or does not match the proposal scope

conditions.name: approval_scope_mismatch
conditions.description: Approval token scope does not match the proposed rehearsal scope

conditions.name: financial_exposure_possible
conditions.description: Any path exists through which the proposal could create financial exposure

conditions.name: proposal_fields_incomplete
conditions.description: Required planning fields from #135 are missing or incomplete

conditions.name: rehearsal_runtime_abort_signal
conditions.description: An abort signal was received during rehearsal execution (e.g. forbidden condition became true mid-run)

conditions.name: rehearsal_runtime_drift_detected
conditions.description: A monitored metric or condition drifted outside its allowed range during rehearsal execution

conditions.name: rehearsal_time_exceeded
conditions.description: Rehearsal execution has exceeded its planned duration

conditions.name: rehearsal_evidence_corrupted
conditions.description: Evidence collected during rehearsal has an integrity failure (checksum mismatch, truncated, unreadable)

RED.meaning: Hard blocker — do not proceed. Escalate immediately.
RED.action_required: Document evidence, escalate to governance contact, do not override.

YELLOW.meaning: Gap or warning — proceed with caution and operator awareness.
YELLOW.action_required: Document gap, inform operator, obtain explicit acknowledgment.

GREEN.meaning: No stop conditions triggered — safe to proceed.

ABORT.meaning: Immediately terminate all activity. Do not create proposal or continue rehearsal.

STOP.meaning: Halt current activity. Do not proceed until the condition is resolved.

WARN.meaning: Issue a warning to the operator. Activity may continue with awareness.
